EST. 2026 FEITO EM PORTUGAL 🇵🇹 PC · MAC · MP-AWARE

LAVRADOR

MODDING

Quiet tools for loud farms.

Game FS 25

Lavrador Modding makes focused, script-only FS25 mods that remove friction from the game: tracking, automation, UI polish. PC/Mac, singleplayer and multiplayer. Built by one developer in Portugal.

License MIT

— WORKS

2 mods

№ 01

Horse Advisor

Sell your horses at the right time.

I built Horse Advisor because FS25's animal UI hides the numbers that matter for timing a horse sale. It tracks every horse from the moment you buy it and surfaces live sell value, profit vs. purchase price, accumulated upkeep, and a projection of when each horse peaks. A color-coded recommendation appears in the animal husbandry menu and the sell screen.

Version 1.0.0.0
Updated 2026-04-26

◐ ○ ✕ ModHub: awaiting Giants review ModHub: GitHub releases only ModHub: not currently distributed there

Install from ModHub Install from Releases Issues ↗

№ 02

Horse Groomer

Pays a stable hand to ride and clean every horse, daily.

I built Horse Groomer because running a stable means riding every horse and scrubbing the muck off them, every day. The mod hires that work out: once a day at a time you choose, every horse on the farm is ridden and cleaned, and your farm account is debited a per-horse service fee. Fitness builds naturally from the daily rides. Stats are not modified.

Version 1.0.0.0
Updated 2026-04-26

◐ ○ ✕ ModHub: awaiting Giants review ModHub: GitHub releases only ModHub: not currently distributed there
